meaning: n.[植]穗状花序,[医]人字形绷带,[天]角宿
examples: The lavandula spica colored language is waits for love the miracle.
The lavandula spica is one kind of strongly fragrant indigo blue floret.
Saturn and Spica are nearly the same brightness but exhibit different colors.
Esa hopes to join a future far-infrared telescope project called Spica.
Unlike Herschel, Spica is likely to use mechanical coolers.
